examples: In a common itch like a mosquito bite, cells in the skin release a chemical called histamine.
Mangosteen could be one of the possible remedies for allergic rhinitis because it blocks histamine production, but what about inflammation?
The antioxidant helps to block histamine.
Thalidomide was discovered by accident in 1954 by chemists in Germany who were trying to produce an anti-histamine.
The immune system produces histamine to fight off the intruder and that chemical causes the symptoms that make people miserable.
